title: Square Glass Ashtray Crystal Cut Effect Transparent Glass Ash Tray for Cigarettes Cigars Glass Indoor Outdoor Home Office Tabletop Pub Garden
features: A heavy-duty square glass ashtray made from extra thick clear glass ideal to use everyday indoors and outdoors. This is a unique 12cm x 12cm deep square glass ashtray with 4 notches to place cigarettes and unique crystal cut design to catch & reflect light to give a luminous shine, and let you know where the ashtray is.
Dimensions of this square glass ashtray are – H: 3.5cm x L: 12cm x W: 12cm. This glass ashtray IS DISHWASHER SAFE.

This glass ashtray is a safe and practical solution for cigarettes and cigars. As it has 4 notches, it is ideal to be placed between a group of people. Suitable for indoor and outdoor placement. Ideal for domestic and commercial use.

EXTRA THICK GLASS CONSTRUCTION – This square glass ashtray is made from high-quality extra durable glass with a long-lasting polished finish to give a weighty feel and ensure they remain in a crisp clear condition after repeated uses. It is a safe solution and thick glass structure will ensure the ashtray stays resistant to common damage i.e. chips, scratches and cracks.

SAVE FURNISHINGS FROM GETTING DAMAGED – Save furnishings inside the home or outside from getting damaged with this square glass ashtray. Glass is a safe solution as it will not catch any sort of flame. It is an easy reach out solution to place ash, which if dropped could cause permanent burns on furniture.
